children.heading: Collaboration
children.label: a Collaboration
children.text: To be eligible to receive assistance under this part, an academic institution shall use such assistance in collaboration with 2 or more disciplines.
to develop and support training programs;
for the provision of stipends for fellowship trainees;
for other activities that will produce outcomes consistent with the purposes of this part.
